title: LawStrings Serves Up Season 2 with India's first Pickleball Auction for lawyers
description: Following the resounding success of its inaugural edition last year, LawStrings Management is set to launch Season 2 of the M3M presents LawStrings Pickleball Premier League (LPPL), a pioneering initiative that continues to redefine engagement within the legal fraternity.This season marks a significant milestone with the introduction of India’s first-ever pickleball auction exclusively for lawyers, bringing an innovative format to the legal sporting ecosystem, with team selections carried out th
